title: Algerian-Style Gooey Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful tagine with gooey meat and spices, inspired by Algerian cuisine. This dish is perfect for a hearty meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the meat and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the Algerian Spice Mix and meat broth. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
Shred the meat with two forks and return it to the pot.
Simmer for an additional 10 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
